items.question: What is a zero-VOC paint?
items.answer: Zero-VOC (volatile organic compound) paints don't release toxic gases as they dry. They're water-based, low-odor and much healthier for your home and the environment.

items.question: Is eco paint more expensive?
items.answer: Cost per litre may be slightly higher, but coverage and durability are comparable. You also avoid extended ventilation costs and can re-occupy rooms faster.

items.question: How long does it take to dry — can I use the room right away?
items.answer: Eco paints are touch-dry in 1–2 hours and rooms can be re-occupied the same day or next day, depending on ventilation and humidity.

items.question: Which areas do you cover?
items.answer: We serve {serviceArea} and surrounding areas. Contact us to confirm availability in your location.

items.question: Do you offer a guarantee?
items.answer: Yes. All our work includes a finish guarantee. If you notice any defect within the agreed period, we'll fix it at no extra cost.
